title: phoradendron villosum var. coryae
intro: Phoradendron villosum var. coryae, also known as Coryae, is a plant species in the mistletoe family (Santalaceae) that is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Coryae include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. Coryae can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions, including skin infections and wounds.
